title: Charlie Charlie Kirky
about: Charlie Charlie Kirky is a song about the late conservative activist Charlie Kirk featuring the lyrics, "Charlie Charlie Kirky, I just popped a perky." The song was created by TikTokers and musicians @intentionsmichigan and @flatroom_vr and released as "Charlie's Barn Yard Song" under the name Randy Diggs featuring Green Little. It went viral after it was reposted to the @thealienarms TikTok page on December 5th, 2025. It was popularized over the following days as the subject of meme edits and videos, including edits that set clips of people and animals dancing to the song. The track also garnered attention on sites like X / Twitter and is comparable to other Charlie Kirk-themed songs, most notably, "We Are Charlie Kirk."
origin:
On December 2nd, 2025, TikToker[7] @intentionsmichigan posted behind-the-scenes footage of the recording of a song called "Charlie's Barn Yard Song," garnering over 29,000 views in two weeks. The song was also posted to SoundCloud.[8]

On December 3rd, the full song was made available on YouTube,[9] garnering over 50,000 views in two weeks.

On December 5th, 2025, TikToker[1] @thealianarms posted a video consisting of the song over colorful footage of a squirrel and a raccoon running and dancing. The section of the song used features the lyrics, "Charlie Charlie Kirky, I just popped a perky" ("perky" being slang for "Percocet"). The video gained over 6.4 million views in four days.
